generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we spend billions on maintaining alliances, recent reports show that many of our partners are not pulling their weight. For example, in 2025, only 3 out of 10 key allies met their agreed-upon defense spending targets. This imbalance puts undue strain on our resources and weakens our overall security. It's time to reassess our commitments and ensure that our alliances are truly reciprocal. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
